content.en:
Seventy-two domains in the east.

Many forces have blocked their headquarters, so that the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor among the forces will not come out.

No matter how arrogant the Shadow Ruins are, they will not attack the headquarters of the forces.

They only like to sneak around and hunt the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors among some small forces, as well as some Eternal True Beasts and Bone Transformation Realm creatures, were unlucky, and they were killed by the Shadow Ruins, and their bodies were all taken away.

There was no shortage of creatures and cultivators above the sixth bone transformation realm in the eastern seventy-two domains, and the shadow ruins were naturally not afraid of not having prey.

They will continue to kill until the Blood Cave Demon Vine is no longer short of nutrients and has given birth to the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, and then they will stop this behavior.

Ye Tian wanted to deal with the shadow ruins, so naturally he couldn't wait for the other party to make a move!

So when?

He had to take the initiative.

Although the ruins of the shadows were mysterious, ordinary Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors didn't know how to get there, but he knew it.

Wind Tooth Island has a record of how to get to the Shadow Ruins.

Any world has a dark side, and the same is true of the land on the other side of eternity, the ruins of shadows are equivalent to the dark side, if you arrange a large array of time and space reversal, you can go to the ruins of shadows through the formation.

Or enter the ruins of the shadows through certain passages, but those specific passages are almost all guarded, and if you use them, it is easy to find out.

The Shadow Ruins is a special treasure that allows him to freely shuttle between the Shadow Ruins and the land of eternity, but he doesn't have that kind of secret treasure, and the best choice is to arrange the time and space reversal array.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian prepared the materials and began to arrange the time-space reversal array.

Soon, this time-space reversal array was successfully arranged.

Rumble!!!!!

The time-space reversal array opened, and Ye Tian directly broke through time and space through the power of the formation, and came to the ruins of shadows.

......

Ruins of Shadows.

Ye Tian came here and felt a dark energy, which was not majestic, but when he came here, he felt uncomfortable.

He then shuttles through the ruins of shadows, surrounded by nothingness and nothingness.

"After shuttling for so long, the resources have not been seen. "

Only then did he realize how poor the resources of the Shadow Ruins were.

There are also very few creatures here, so it's no wonder that the Shadow Ruins don't attack the creatures of the Shadow Ruins, but choose to attack the creatures of the Eternal Lands.

After all, there are too many creatures in the land of eternity, and killing a stubble will not affect anything.

But if the Shadow Ruins were to be slaughtered like this, there would not be many living beings here, and other forces would not allow the Shadow Ruins to do this!

It makes sense for Shadow Ruins to do this, and if it were him, he would choose to do it.

However, they are not one-sided, they can only be enemies.

Whether it's the Land of Eternity or the Ruins of Shadows, there are no pure bad guys and good guys, some are just competing interests.

The Shadow Ruins only saw that the Bloody Domain was weak, so he focused on killing in the Bloody Flame Domain, if he didn't care, the Terran would probably have to kill a lot of Bone Transformation Realm.

Fengya Island also has some information about the Shadow Ruins, but after all, it has not been paid attention to for many years, and now the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins is still there, and I am not sure.

But.

After Ye Tian determined the location, he still went to the eastern location of the Shadow Ruins.

......

The ruins of shadows, the river of shadow sand.

This is a rare treasure of the Shadow Ruins, the Shadow Ruins have built a branch here, and the resources born of the Shadow Sand River will be taken away by the Shadow Ruins, and there are many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors stationed here.

Almost all of the seventy-two domains in the eastern part of the land of eternity are under the jurisdiction of this branch, and after killing those bone transformation realms, they will bring the corpses back and send them to the side of the blood cave demon vine.

Ye Tian didn't dare to go directly to the Blood Cave Demon Vine, which was the headquarters of the Shadow Ruins, and there was a Origin Origin Upper Realm to sit down, he ran over directly, it was undoubtedly a death!

The Shadow Sand River is large, but the Shadow Ruins have complete control over it.

Ye Tian did not enter the Shadow Sand Flow River, otherwise it would have been easy to find.

Thereupon.

He was hiding nearby, waiting for the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Sand Flowing River to come over.

this day.

He finally waited for an Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor to come out of the Shadow Sand River and head to the Shadow Ruins Headquarters at an extremely fast speed.

En route.

Ye Tian made a move.

Rumble!

In an instant, he killed this Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and then quickly copied the opponent's body.

After the replication was completed, he refined all the treasures on the other party's body, completely replacing the other party.

No matter how the shadow ruins calculated, they couldn't see that this body was fake.

"This Shadow Ruins Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor also carries a lot of Bone Transformation Realm corpses on his body!"

He didn't destroy these Bone Transformation Realm corpses, he also wanted to sneak into the Shadow Ruins Headquarters to have a look.

Subsequently.

He headed straight for the Shadow Ruins headquarters.

After some time, he arrived at the Shadow Ruins headquarters.

Just as he arrived at the Shadow Ruins headquarters, a Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor appeared in front of him.

"Cave Eagle, follow me to the Blood Cave Demon Vine and feed those Bone Transformation Realm corpses to the Blood Cave Demon Vine. "

Through the exploration of the Copying Talent, he knew the name of this Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

【Oni】

Ye Tian followed this Ghost Lord to the Blood Cave Demon Vine, and he easily mixed in without any suspicion.

Soon.

He saw a terrifying blood cave demon vine that ran through many time and space, and there were countless leaves on the blood cave demon vine, each leaf was like a world, and there were palaces on it, and the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins cultivated here.

They came to the top of the Blood Cave Demon Vine, where a blood-colored giant flower was about to be put on hold.

Once it blooms, it will give birth to a Blood Cave Fruit.

"Cave Eagle, take out those Bone Transformation Realm corpses and let the Blood Cave Demon Vine devour them!" said the Lord of the Devils.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a large number of corpses of the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor appeared.

In an instant, countless vine thorns appeared on the Blood Cave Demon Vine, penetrating these Bone Transformation Realm corpses, and then absorbing them.

Gradually, the Blood Cave Demon Vine let out a look of excitement.

"Dong Ying, you go back, and when the next batch of bone transformation realm corpses arrives, you will send them back. "The Lord of the Devils.

"I see!"

Ye Tian left immediately.

The Lord of the Devil Turtle saw that the tone and form of the cave eagle had changed a little from the past, but he didn't think much about it.

In short, it's good that the cave eagle can complete the task.

Soon after.

Ye Tian returned to the Shadow Sand River and entered the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins.

After that, he stayed here to find out.

After some time, he learned about the strength of the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins.

The eastern part of the Shadow Ruins has eleven Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and two hundred and sixty-two Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Unlike Wind Tooth Island, the people on Wind Tooth Island are all geniuses on the other side, but this is not the case in the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins, most of them are still ordinary Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and their combat effectiveness is average.

However, those who infiltrated the eastern part of the Eternal Shore to carry out the mission were all top-level geniuses of the Origin Lower Realm, which could ensure safety and mission success. ~
